title: 3 missiles
description: We received RAS-3 missiles from our partners in the appropriate quantity, and then this quantity per month was reduced several times. It was not because of a shortage of money, but because of the war in the Middle East. This was reflected in various types of weapons. We replaced what we could with our domestic production, but we cannot replace RAS-3 yet. In the 25th year, we had the opportunity to negotiate with the American...
description_en: We received RAS-3 missiles from our partners in the appropriate quantity, and then this quantity per month was reduced several times. It was not because of a shortage of money, but because of the war in the Middle East. This was reflected in various types of weapons. We replaced what we could with our domestic production, but we cannot replace RAS-3 yet. In the 25th year, we had the opportunity to negotiate with the American...
description_uk: Ми отримували від наших партнерів ракети РАС-3 у відповідній кількості, а потім ця кількість на місяць була зменшена в рази. Це було не через дефіцит грошей, а через війну на Близькому Сході. Це відображалося на різних видах зброї. Що могли, ми заміняли своїм вітчизняним виробництвом, але РАС-3 ми поки що замінити не можемо. У 25-му році у нас з'явилася можливість домовитися з американським...

title: Kyiv: Thousands of bogus Ukrainian companies involved in massive capital...
title_en: Kyiv: Thousands of bogus Ukrainian companies involved in massive capital...
title_uk: Київ: Тисячі фіктивних українських компаній, задіяних у великому капіталі...
description: Thousands of bogus Ukrainian companies involved in massive capital flight scheme, tax authority says. More than 2,300 companies carried out over Hr 198 billion ($4.5 billion) in foreign trade transactions and then largely vanished, State Tax Service head Lesya Karnaukh wrote on social media. The majority — 1,243 companies — were involved in exporting goods.
description_en: Thousands of bogus Ukrainian companies involved in massive capital flight scheme, tax authority says. More than 2,300 companies carried out over Hr 198 billion ($4.5 billion) in foreign trade transactions and then largely vanished, State Tax Service head Lesya Karnaukh wrote on social media. The majority — 1,243 companies — were involved in exporting goods.
description_uk: Thousands of bogus Ukrainian companies involved in massive capital flight scheme, tax authority says. More than 2,300 companies carried out over Hr 198 billion ($4.5 billion) in foreign trade transactions and then largely vanished, State Tax Service head Lesya Karnaukh wrote on social media. The majority — 1,243 companies — were involved in exporting goods.

title: Air defense active
description: I want to thank all the partners who help us get Patriot interceptor missiles through PURL. By doing this, you save lives in Ukraine. But the current volumes and rates of supply are not enough. We need more Patriot interceptor missiles, and we need them delivered faster. That is why the key thing we need to do together is to ensure the continued support of our anti-aircraft...
description_en: I want to thank all the partners who help us get Patriot interceptor missiles through PURL. By doing this, you save lives in Ukraine. But the current volumes and rates of supply are not enough. We need more Patriot interceptor missiles, and we need them delivered faster. That is why the key thing we need to do together is to ensure the continued support of our anti-aircraft...
description_uk: Хочу подякувати всім партнерам, які допомагають нам отримувати ракети-перехоплювачі Patriot через PURL. Роблячи це, ви рятуєте життя в Україні. Але нинішніх обсягів і темпів постачання недостатньо. Нам потрібно більше ракет-перехоплювачів Patriot, і нам потрібно, щоб їх постачали швидше. Саме тому ключове, що нам потрібно зробити разом, – забезпечити подальшу підтримку нашої протиповітряної...

title: Attack attack
description: Muscovites attacked the Novaya Poshta terminal in Dnipro. The fate of the parcels is still unknown. A few days earlier, one of the separate "NP" was destroyed in the Dnipro. For the destruction of parcels in our long-range sanctions, there should be some special "gifts" for swamps.
description_en: Muscovites attacked the Novaya Poshta terminal in Dnipro. The fate of the parcels is still unknown. A few days earlier, one of the separate "NP" was destroyed in the Dnipro. For the destruction of parcels in our long-range sanctions, there should be some special "gifts" for swamps.
description_uk: Московиты нанесли удар по терминалу "Новой почты" в Днепре. Судьба посылок пока неизвестна. Несколькими днями ранее в Днепре было уничтожено одно из отделений "НП". За уничтожение посылок в наших дальнобойных санкциях должны быть какие-то специальные "подарки" для болот.

The new flight will start in the Polish city of Przemyśl, located near the border with Ukraine. Then the train will pass through: Krakow,...

description_uk: В Європі відкривають один із найдовших залізничних маршрутів від кордону з Україною🚇 Чеський приватний оператор Leo Express запускає нове сполучення 25 червня. Маршрут простягнеться більш ніж на 1300 кілометрів і проходитиме через Польщу, Чехію та Німеччину. Новий рейс стартуватиме у польському місті Перемишль, розташованому неподалік кордону з Україною. Далі потяг проходитиме через: Краків,...

description: Project 20380 corvette was hit in Kronstadt ⚡️On the night of June 3, 2026, units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine in Kronstadt (one of the bases of the Baltic Fleet of the Russian Navy) hit a project 20380 "Steregushchy" corvette. According to preliminary information, it is about the ship "Boykiy". A large-scale fire has been confirmed on board the vessel. The results and extent of damages are being clarified. Project 20380 corvettes are multipurpose combat...

Корвети проєкту 20380 є багатоцільовими бойовими...

title: Drone strike
description: Zelensky confirmed the strikes on St. Petersburg and Kronstadt. Drones "hit" the St. Petersburg oil terminal, located approximately 1,100 km from the Ukrainian border, as well as targets at the Russian Navy base in Kronstadt. In addition, an enterprise in the Tambov region involved in the production of Russian weapons was hit.
description_en: Zelensky confirmed the strikes on St. Petersburg and Kronstadt. Drones "hit" the St. Petersburg oil terminal, located approximately 1,100 km from the Ukrainian border, as well as targets at the Russian Navy base in Kronstadt. In addition, an enterprise in the Tambov region involved in the production of Russian weapons was hit.
description_uk: Зеленский подтвердил удары по Петербургу и Кронштадту Дроны «потрепали» Петербургский нефтяной терминал, расположенный примерно в 1100 км от украинской границы, а также цели на базе ВМФ РФ в Кронштадте. Кроме того, под удар попало предприятие в Тамбовской области, задействованное в производстве российского вооружения.
